---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.container .py-5 .text-center}

# Welcome to rMicrobe! {#sec-welcome-to-rmicrobe}

:::

This is a website created by Rebecca Key (me!). 

On this website, you will find **a collection of coding tutorials**. All made to help scientists handle, wrangle, and analyze big data derived from microbial samples. Tutorials are in multiple coding languages (ie. syntax), such as **R, python, and BASH**. 

You can also find available tinyLife illustrations for academic use. Feel free to reach out to license, commission, or discuss a project figure. My contact info is below! 

---

Pages: 

::: {.container .py-5 .text-center}

[Rebecca Pages](bib/main.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}

[rMicrobe Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}

[tinyLife Illustrations](illustrations/list.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .me-2}

:::
---


### 💬 Have questions?

Email: **rkeymicrobe@proton.me**  
Please write **tutorial** or **art** in the subject line
